_doc: USDA FAS GAIN Brazil Coffee Annual — manually transcribed from BR2026-0025 (June 1 2026 release). Used as a seed fallback by scraper/sources/usda_gain_pdf.py when the live FAS landing-page fetch fails (current state: FAS Cloudflare-blocks GitHub Actions IPs with 403). Update when USDA publishes a new Coffee Annual or Coffee Semi-annual. Values are in metric tons.
source: USDA FAS GAIN BR2026-0025 (Brazil Coffee Annual, June 1 2026)
